description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 50 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 14 mins. His time was mostly spent in Java (63%) and Markdown (22%), with the remainder in other languages. The activity data does not list any public GitHub repos, commits, PRs, or new repos this week.
